name: Earth
desc: You are from Earth.

push_stages.prompt: What part of Earth are you from?

name: The Green Zone
desc: The Terran Federation green zone, where there is at least some semblance of peace and stability.

name: The Dead Zone
desc: One of the fortresses in the dead zone. Food is scarce and life is precarious.

name: Frontier
desc: You were born in a small town on the edge of civilization.

push_stages.prompt: How was growing up in your frontier town?

name: City
desc: You were born in a city and led an average life there.

push_stages.prompt: What part of the city were you raised in?

name: Idealist
desc: Your heritage includes a significant amount of genetic engineering.

[LPB_INTRO]: As a child, you began to show exceptional abilities.
You come from a long line of idealists, and your family had great expectations for you.

push_stages.prompt: How did you perform in school?

name: Outcast
desc: You have always lived on the fringes of society.

[LPB_INTRO]: From birth, you never really fit in with your peers.
Your early life was spent on the fringes of society.

push_stages.prompt: What is it that set you apart from your peers?

name: Orphan
desc: You lost your parents at a young age.

[LPB_INTRO]: Your parents died when you were very young.
You were raised in an orphanage and never knew your parents.
You were left on the doorstop of an orphanage in [town].
Your parents were killed in an attack by [enemies].

push_stages.prompt: How did you cope with the loss of your parents?

name: Close Community
desc: Life was hard, but everyone helped everyone else out.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your community was very close knit.

name: Boring Life
desc: Mostly it was boring; I longed to escape.

[LPB_DETAILS]: As a child you dreamed of leaving home and going on big adventures.
Growing up, you always dreamed of escape.

name: Dangerous Place
desc: Our village was always under threat.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your community was under constant attack by [enemies].

name: Crime Alley
desc: I lived in a rough part of town; gangs ruled the streets.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your home was in the bad side of town; you quickly learned to keep a low profile.
Your neighborhood was riddled with crime. To survive, you had to keep your head down.

name: Good Neighborhood
desc: I lived in a nice part of town.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your neighborhood was nice enough.
Your family's home was on the rich side of town.
Overall, you had a happy childhood.

name: Cosmopolitan City
desc: I lived in a diverse neighborhood, mingling with different cultures and people from all parts of human space.

[LPB_DETAILS]: You grew up in a multicultural area, surrounded by immigrants from all over human space.
Your home was in the trading district, where you became familiar with many cultures.

name: Overachiever
desc: I was very competitive; every subject was a challenge to be mastered.

[LPB_DETAILS]: In school you were very competitive. Every subject was a challenge to be mastered.

name: Slacker
desc: My natural talents made me lazy at school.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Because of your natural talents, you never had to work as hard as your peers.
Your genetic enhancements meant you never had to push yourself.

name: Tekno
desc: When my aptitude for computers was discovered, I was put to work as a tekno.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Your exceptional aptitude for computers led to you being inducted as a tekno.
From a young age you were put to work maintaining the tech of your community.
You feel more comfortable with machines than with other humans.

name: Star Student
desc: My abilities gave me more free time to live- meeting friends, joining clubs, entering contests.

[LPB_DETAILS]: You became a star student, running for class president and taking part in many activities.
You used your free time to tutor classmates and help out around town.
Your abilities made you a natural leader, forming teams to take part in [school_contest].

name: Found Family
desc: I took comfort in my friends and caretakers.

[LPB_DETAILS]: You were like a surrogate parent to the other orphans.
Over time, you found a new family in your friends and caretakers.
You were adopted by a family who cared for you deeply.

name: Lonely Road
desc: I kept to myself, and still don't get close to people.

[LPB_DETAILS]: You were adopted by a family that neglected you.
You shut yourself off from human connections.

name: Child Labor
desc: Having no family to take me, I was sent to work right away.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Without any means to support yourself, you were taken to serve as the town's buttonpresser.
Lacking any family to look after you, you were taken in as a junior laborer by the local factory.

name: Cultural Exchange
desc: Having no family to look after me, I was sent on a cultural exchange program to the L5 spinners.

[LPB_DETAILS]: Lacking any other family, you were sent as a cultural exchange student to an L5 space colony.
You were sent to an L5 space colony to be raised alongside a creche of similarly aged children.
